examples.title: Pseudocode: Knowledge Representation
examples.description: A simple pseudocode example demonstrating knowledge representation using frames.
examples.code:
FRAME Dog
 SLOT breed
 SLOT color
 SLOT size
END FRAME

FRAME MyDog
 IS-A Dog
 breed = "Golden Retriever"
 color = "Golden"
 size = "Medium"
END FRAME
examples.explanation: This pseudocode defines two frames: Dog and MyDog. The Dog frame has three slots: breed, color, and size. The MyDog frame is an instance of the Dog frame and fills in the slots with specific values.

examples.title: Python: Semantic Network
examples.description: A Python implementation of a simple semantic network.
examples.code:
class Node:
 def __init__(self, name):
 self.name = name
 self.is_a = None

 def set_is_a(self, node):
 self.is_a = node

# Create nodes
animal = Node("Animal")
dog = Node("Dog")
my_dog = Node("My Dog")

# Set is-a relationships
dog.set_is_a(animal)
my_dog.set_is_a(dog)

# Print is-a relationships
print(my_dog.name + " is-a " + my_dog.is_a.name)
print(my_dog.is_a.name + " is-a " + my_dog.is_a.is_a.name)
examples.explanation: This Python code defines a Node class to represent nodes in a semantic network. Each node has a name and an is-a relationship with another node. The code creates three nodes: Animal, Dog, and My Dog, and sets up the is-a relationships between them.

examples.title: Python: Declarative Knowledge
examples.description: A Python implementation of declarative knowledge using a dictionary.
examples.code:
knowledge_base = {
 "Capital of France": "Paris",
 "Capital of Germany": "Berlin"
}

# Query the knowledge base
print(knowledge_base["Capital of France"])

# Add new knowledge
def add_knowledge(key, value):
 knowledge_base[key] = value

add_knowledge("Capital of Italy", "Rome")
print(knowledge_base["Capital of Italy"])
examples.explanation: This Python code defines a dictionary to represent a knowledge base. The dictionary stores declarative knowledge as key-value pairs. The code demonstrates querying the knowledge base and adding new knowledge.
